sourcesContent:
import { useState } from 'react' const mockArticles = [ { id: 1, headline: "Global Markets Rally as Economic Indicators Show Strong Growth", subtitle: "Investors celebrate as major indices reach new heights in a surprising turn of events that has analysts rethinking their forecasts for the coming quarter.", category: "Economics", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611974789855-9c2a0a7236a3?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Sarah Jenkins", time: "2 hours ago" }, { id: 2, headline: "Championship Final Set for Next Weekend", subtitle: "Top teams prepare for the ultimate showdown.", category: "Sports", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574629810360-7efbbe195018?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Mike Ross", time: "4 hours ago" }, { id: 3, headline: "New Film Breaks Box Office Records", subtitle: "Audiences flock to theaters for latest blockbuster.", category: "Entertainment", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1489599849927-2ee91cede3ba?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Emily Chen", time: "5 hours ago" }, { id: 4, headline: "International Summit Addresses Climate Change", subtitle: "World leaders commit to ambitious new targets.", category: "International", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611273426858-450d8e3c9fce?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "David Miller", time: "6 hours ago" }, { id: 5, headline: "Tech Innovation Transforms Healthcare Industry", subtitle: "AI-powered solutions revolutionize patient care.", category: "Technology", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559757148-5c350d0d3c56?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Jessica Wong", time: "8 hours ago" }, { id: 6, headline: "Cultural Festival Celebrates Local Heritage", subtitle: "Community comes together for annual celebration.", category: "Culture", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514525253161-7a46d19cd819?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Tom Baker", time: "1 day ago" }, { id: 7, headline: "Scientists Discover New Species in Deep Ocean", subtitle: "Marine biologists excited about groundbreaking find.", category: "Science", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559827260-dc66d52bef19?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Alan Grant", time: "1 day ago" }, { id: 8, headline: "Local Restaurant Wins Prestigious Award", subtitle: "Chef's innovative cuisine earns international recognition.", category: "Lifestyle", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Gordon R.", time: "2 days ago" }, { id: 9, headline: "Major Infrastructure Project Breaks Ground", subtitle: "City officials celebrate new transportation hub.", category: "Local", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504307651254-35680f356dfd?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Leslie K.", time: "2 days ago" } ] export default function HeadlinesPage() { const [articles] = useState(mockArticles) // Layout distribution const heroArticle = articles[0] const firstMasonryBatch = articles.slice(1, 5) const featureBreakArticle = articles[5] const secondMasonryBatch = articles.slice(6) const ArticleCard = ({ article, className = "" }) => (
{article.category}

{article.headline}

{article.subtitle}

{article.time}
) return (
{/* Fresh Header */}

headlines

headlines

{new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}

The Daily Edition

{/* Hero Section */}
{heroArticle.category}

{heroArticle.headline}

{heroArticle.subtitle}

By {heroArticle.author} {heroArticle.time}
{/* First Masonry Batch */}
{firstMasonryBatch.map((article) => ( ))}
{/* Feature Break */} {featureBreakArticle && (
{featureBreakArticle.category}

{featureBreakArticle.headline}

{featureBreakArticle.subtitle}

{featureBreakArticle.time}
)} {/* Second Masonry Batch */}
{secondMasonryBatch.map((article) => ( ))}
) }
